instruction: Questions 11–12 and 13–14: Choose TWO A–E. Questions 15–20: Matching A–H.

questions.prompt: Which TWO things does the speaker say about visiting the football stadium with children?

options.label: Children can get their photo taken with a football player.
There is a competition for children today.
Parents must stay with their children at all times.
Children will need sunhats and drinks.
The café has a special offer on meals for children.

questions.explanation: Cuộc thi (B) và ở cạnh con (C).
